description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the haskell:8.8 Docker image and runs `apt-get update && apt-get install xz-utils make` in a global before_script. Add a `pages` job (default stage) that executes `stack setup`, `stack build`, `stack exec site build`, and `mv _site public`. Cache the directories `_cache` and `.stack-work`, publish the `public` directory as a Pages artifact, and configure the job to run only on the `master` branch, deploying to GitLab Pages.
